info.title: APIbase — Universal API Hub for AI Agents
info.description: APIbase aggregates, normalizes, and provides APIs from hundreds of businesses in a unified format optimized for AI agent consumption. Search flights, trade prediction markets, check weather, and more — all via a single REST API or MCP endpoint.
